page_content:
LBSC709 Independent Study (1-3 Credits)

Intensive individual study, reading, or research in an area of specialized interest under faculty supervision.

Restriction: Permission of instructor; and permission of INFO-College of Information Studies.

Repeatable to: 9 credits.

LBSC713 Planning and Evaluating Library and Information Services (3 Credits)

An investigation of quantitative and qualitative methods used to plan and evaluate the effectiveness of library and information services. Planning and evaluation methodologies will be analyzed and critiqued. Selected methods will be demonstrated and/or utilized.
